title: BEM-866 patch commit evidence
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if wf.exists() else ''
# Add a conservative commit evidence step after any existing commit/push step or before Job summary.
step = '''
      - name: BEM-866 commit evidence
        if: always()
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/runtime/curator_dispatch
          git rev-parse HEAD > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CURRENT_HEAD_SHA.txt
          git status --short > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_GIT_STATUS_SHORT.txt
          git diff --name-only HEAD > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_GIT_DIFF_NAME_ONLY.txt || true
          git add governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CURRENT_HEAD_SHA.txt governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_GIT_STATUS_SHORT.txt governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_GIT_DIFF_NAME_ONLY.txt || true
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git config user.name "ai-devops-system"
            git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"
            git commit -m "BEM-866 commit evidence"
            git pull --rebase --autostash origin main
            git push origin HEAD:main
          fi

'''
anchor = '      - name: Job summary
'
if 'BEM-866 commit evidence' not in text:
    if anchor in text:
        text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
    else:
        text = text.rstrip() + step + '
'
wf.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_COMMIT_EVIDENCE_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 commit evidence patched
Status: PATCHED
Workflow: .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml
Evidence files: BEM866_CURRENT_HEAD_SHA.txt, BEM866_GIT_STATUS_SHORT.txt, BEM866_GIT_DIFF_NAME_ONLY.txt
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(wf))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched codex-runner commit evidence step')
"""
No issue comments.
